sections.title: Trying to use the coral nurseries

lines.speaker: Chet
lines.text: Leave the coral nurseries alone please.

lines.speaker: Chet
lines.text: Hello, human. Please be careful around the coral nurseries.

lines.speaker: Chet
lines.text: Human. Apparently you helped out with a gryphon problem or something. Reggle says you're now trusted enough to use the coral nurseries.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Would you look after my coral for me?

lines.speaker: Chet
lines.text: I suppose. Which nursery were you thinking of?

lines.speaker: Chet
lines.text: You haven't put any frags in that nursery yet. Do so and I might agree to look after it for you.

lines.speaker: Chet
lines.text: You haven't put any frags in that nursery yet. Do so and I might agree to look after it for you.

lines.speaker: Chet
lines.text: That depends on whether I have it to sell. What is it that you're looking for?
